subject: Accounting
title: Operational Audits
description: A fast breakdown of Operational Audits for builders.

hook.text: A factory runs 24/7 but profits keep shrinking. An operational audit finds out why.

buildup.text: Operational audits evaluate how efficiently and effectively an organization uses its resources.

discovery.text: They look at processes, workflows, and management decisions—not just financial numbers.

twist.text: The audit might find that a profitable division is wasting millions on an outdated process.

climax.text: Recommendations from operational audits can save companies far more than the audit costs.

punchline.text: Financial audits check the score. Operational audits improve the game.

quiz.question: What does an operational audit evaluate?
